codes.VALIDATION_FAILED: The provided data does not meet security or format criteria.
codes.UNAUTHORIZED_ACCESS: Your identity does not have permissions to perform this action.
codes.INTERNAL_SYSTEM_FAILURE: An internal platform failure occurred. Our technical team has been notified.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: The requested resource does not exist or has been permanently removed.
codes.EXTERNAL_SERVICE_TIMEOUT: An external service took too long to respond. Please try again.
